productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Casual Green Flats
description: The perfect way to complement your everyday wear is to slip into these comfy slippers from carlton london. The padded synthetic straps with a padded comfy foootbed is designed with much care to ensure your feet the best of comfort. UpperSynthetic midfoot straps in a knotted style, with a toe separator to lock the foot in placePadded footbed for all-day comfort OutsoleTextured durable rubber outsole with a floral groove on the forefoot for absolute grip and tractionSlipper careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
